name: rulixa
description: Generate Phase 1 context packs for WPF and .NET workspaces through Rulixa.Cli.

interface.shortDescription: Run the Phase 1 pack flow through Rulixa.Cli.
interface.longDescription: This plugin exposes the current Phase 1 flow for WPF + .NET 8 workspaces. The primary path is the pack command with entry=file or entry=symbol, while scan and resolve-entry remain support commands on the CLI.
defaultPrompt: Build a Phase 1 context pack for ShellViewModel.
Resolve a file entry for ShellView.xaml and then run pack.
Run the Rulixa.Cli pack command and summarize the output.
